title: Debate on Budget 2024-25
text: Discussion on infrastructure growth, tax reforms, and agricultural subsidies. Opposition raised concerns about unemployment and inflation.
importance: Helps politicians understand the arguments for and against major policies and prepares them for counter-arguments.

title: Discussion on Digital Personal Data Protection Bill
text: Debate regarding citizen privacy, government's access to data, and obligations of data fiduciaries.
importance: Critical for understanding legislative intent and public concerns over technology policies.
